name: ProfileEnrichmentFanIn

neutralConcepts: DUAL-RECORD-WRITE: PRIVATE full profile + GLOBAL 4 match-safe fields only
FAN_IN: Promise.allSettled for A1+A2 parallel — Promise.all forbidden
DNA-8: both storeDocument calls before BusinessProfileCreated emit
Debounce key: compound tenantId+userId — single-dimension key contaminates cross-tenant

ironRules.rule: A1 writes TWO records: xiigen-business-profiles (PRIVATE, full schema incl. questionnaire) + xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL, 4 fields: industry_code, business_stage, location_proximity, team_size_tier)
A3 @EventPattern must be 'BusinessProfileCreated' — NEVER 'QuestionnaireCompleted'. A3 triggers on A1's output event, not the original trigger.
FAN_IN parallel enrichment: use Promise.allSettled([A1, A2]). Promise.all is forbidden — source failure must not block sibling enrichment.
DNA-8: both storeDocument calls (PRIVATE + GLOBAL) BEFORE BusinessProfileCreated enqueue. Order: store-private → store-global → enqueue.
GLOBAL record (xiigen-matching-profiles) must NOT contain questionnaire, goals, challenges, skillGaps, revenue, or any sensitive field. Only 4 match-safe fields allowed.
Debounce key = 'debounce:{tenantId}:{userId}' — compound. A userId-only key contaminates across tenants. SUBFLOW-02D handles debounce: D1 key check / D2 profile return / D3 discard record.

keywords: business profile enrichment fan-in dual record write private global matching profiles debounce tenant isolation
